framework.name: Agent Identity via Prompt/Config Checksum
framework.description: Binds agent identity to a hash of its prompt, tools, and configuration — meaning if an agent's prompt is injected or tools change, its identity changes and tokens become invalid. This is a novel approach to detecting prompt injection at the auth layer.
framework.raw_quote: agent's identity as a one-way checksum hash derived from its prompt, tools and configuration

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
